title: Smoky Calamarata Pasta
description: A hearty, smoky pasta dish inspired by the Italian countryside, made with calamarata pasta and a savory sauce.

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.notes: Chopped onion adds flavor and texture

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Fresh garlic enhances the smoky flavor

ingredients.name: Calamarata Pasta
ingredients.notes: Calamarata pasta pairs perfectly with smoky flavors

ingredients.name: Canned Crushed Tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Crushed tomatoes add a rich, tangy flavor

ingredients.name: Smoked Paprika
ingredients.notes: Smoked paprika gives the dish its smoky flavor

ingredients.name: Fresh Basil
ingredients.notes: Fresh basil adds a bright, herbaceous flavor

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add minced garlic and sauté for an additional minute.
Add crushed tomatoes, smoked paprika, salt, and chopped basil. Stir to combine.
Bring the sauce to a simmer and let cook for 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
While the sauce simmers, cook calamarata pasta according to package instructions.
Drain the cooked pasta and add it to the skillet with the sauce. Toss to combine.
Serve hot, garnished with additional basil if desired.
